prompt: What is the difference between TCP and UDP, and name one real-world use case for each?

Track 1 specifically scored submissions on an accuracy gate followed by token efficiency, encouraging participants to build hybrid systems that avoid unnecessary model calls. Participants received Fireworks AI credits and access to AMD cloud compute for the duration of the event.'

Five friends - Ivy, Jude, Kai, Lena, and Moss - sit in a row of 5 seats numbered 1 to 5. Ivy does not sit in seat 1. Moss does not sit in seat 5. The person who drinks tea sits immediately after Ivy. Kai does not drink water, and Kai does not sit immediately before Lena. Who sits in seat 1?
